productDisplayName: Nike Men Kukini Black Sports Shoes
description: Style Note With plush cushioning and a supportive Fit, the nike Kukini Free shoe is perfect for those who love healthy runs. Lightweight and comfortable, this shoe also doubles up as a great everyday wear for those who enjoy long walks. Product Details Mesh upper for enhanced ventilation with felt and synthetic overlays Strategically placed synthetic overlays for added shoe structure and durability Meshed and padded tongue and sockliner for all-day comfort Slide in system for a supportive fit and to lock the foot in place Pull tab at the heel collar Dual-density Phylon midsole for a unique blend of lightweight cushioning and enhanced impact protection Cushioned fabric footbed for all-day comfort BRS 1000 carbon rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs on the forefoot for optimal traction on various surfaces Forefoot flex grooves for a more natural range of motion Material and Care Synthetic, mesh Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
